assets.name: lecture_03_figure_05.png
assets.rationale: This frame gives the best overall evidence for the boardwork at this moment. It preserves both the geometric sketch and the nearby algebra, with less occlusion than the later frames where Susskind's arms cover more of the drawing. The crossed null lines, marked central point, and the newly drawn right-hand boundary or constant-r feature are all visible together, making it the most useful frame for reconstructing the layout.
